title: Additions & More
description: Assorted ideas that didn't make it into my other mods!
body:
![The Additions & More banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/845d2a8918597901a380a4d922d4ee4cdac45e93.png)

## Welcome to Additions & More! This mod adds many assorted ideas that i had for other mods that didnt quite fit into their theme

<center>

### Join our discord to stay up to date with mod updates, teasers, and more! (click)
[![Discord banner image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9cea9cd7dc8511b56c21d5eef30b040a9f9f81d2.png)](https://discord.gg/mEYDh4SUWN)

</center>

### Features may move to different projects!

### Requires GeckoLib!
[![GeckoLib logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/197e417b0e192c49a53b39d7ad40764848f6959a.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)

### MOBS

>#### Metalplate Wanderer

Used to be a player a long time ago, but got badly injured in a battle. He was repaired using an experimental technique that involved welding metal plates to the skin, but it caused him to get corrupted, and now attacks any player (and iron golem) on sight. Very powerful, with 40 health, 5 attack damage and 10 armor points. Only fight one when you are prepared! They can drop iron nuggets, iron ingots and flesh.

![The Metalplate Wanderer at night](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5750d1cc51d4276062a110cab86649e5d98c3b65.png)

>#### Possessed Sword

An iron sword possessed by an unknown spirit that just so happens to be very hostile. Has 24 health and 5 attack damage, and can move quickly towards the player. Drops iron nuggets and sticks.

![The Possessed Sword at night](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/efe1377d95b7989685187d789bd1e3d6680b67d7.png)

### ITEMS

>#### Flesh

Do not eat it.

![Some flesh in an item frame](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c80d344a0602143271ca3f60d7f5c0a32eb18c57.png)

### Q&A

>Q: Fabric?

A: No. This mod was made specifically for the mod loader that i usually play on, which is forge.

>Q: Will you backport to below/above 1.20.1?

A: No. This mod was made specifically for the version that i usually play on, which is 1.20.1. I may change my mind later though.

> Q: Can i use this in my modpack?

A: Sure, You can give credit if you want, but i won't enforce it.
